Methodology

Data source: Nursing Home Provider Info (dataset ID: nh-provider-info). Vintage: 2026. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 14,703.

Additional data sources: Nursing Home Penalties (2026) Nursing Home Health Deficiencies (2026) Nursing Home Ownership (2026) Skilled Nursing Facility Cost Report (2023)
